title: ChemInform Abstract: α‐Amino Acid‐Isosteric α‐Amino Tetrazoles.
author_string: Zhao, Ting, Kurpiewska, Katarzyna, Kalinowska‐Tluscik, Justyna, Herdtweck, Eberhardt, Doemling, Alexander
abstract: AbstractA concise and rapid approach is evaluated for all 20 natural proteinogenic α‐amino acids and 4 analogues.
